commonAnnotations.summary: Deployment payments-api: 3 of 5 desired replicas ready for 15 minutes.
commonAnnotations.description: An HPA-driven scale-up from 3 to 5 replicas has stalled. Running pods are healthy; no new pod has appeared.
commonAnnotations.error: ReplicaSet shows FailedCreate events; no per-pod warnings.
commonAnnotations.suspected_symptom: Deployment cannot reach desired replica count without any individual pod failing.
